name: interim-dev-loop
description: Prove the interim (pre-Artifacts) Studio dev-loop end-to-end and nail down the API method names used in tasks/nebula-dev-flows.md. Stage 1: DevStudio = @cloudflare/shell Workspace + isomorphic-git in a DO (writeSource/commit/read/getChangedSince). Stage 2: DevContainer.pull() mesh-fetches changed files → vite HMR. The git remote is the only swap point for Artifacts later.
